pr.title: Record: SLOT + Split-LR + Full GPTQ + XSA-all — val_bpb 1.1015 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines SLOT eval-time delta tuning with split early/late Muon LR, sigmoid-gated skips, soft-round QAT, and compression/minification tweaks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: SLOT only adapts a delta vector during evaluation without training on validation shards.
techniques: SLOT eval-time delta optimization per sliding-window batch
Sigmoid-gated skip connections with soft-round QAT alpha ramp for int6 GPTQ
Split Muon LR schedule plus minified Brotli packaging & larger BigramHash
